scripts.test:fast: pnpm run test:app && pnpm run test:server && pnpm run test:wire && pnpm run test:agent && pnpm run test:cli:unit
scripts.test:parser: pnpm --filter happy-app exec vitest run sources/components/parseLocalCommandMessage.spec.ts sources/sync/messageTaxonomy.test.ts sources/sync/reducer/reducer.spec.ts sources/sync/typesRaw.spec.ts
scripts.test:server:routes: sh -c 'cd packages/happy-server && pnpm exec vitest run sources/app/api/authNonce.test.ts sources/app/api/routes/*.test.ts sources/app/api/routes/*.spec.ts'
scripts.test:cli:unit: pnpm --filter happy exec vitest run --project unit
scripts.test:compatibility: pnpm --filter happy-app exec vitest run sources/sync/apiCapabilities.test.ts && pnpm --filter happy-server-self-host exec vitest run sources/app/api/routes/versionRoutes.test.ts && pnpm --filter happy exec vitest run --project unit src/api/apiSession.test.ts src/api/apiMachine.test.ts
scripts.test:integration: pnpm --filter happy test:integration && pnpm --filter happy-agent test:integration
scripts.test:security: pnpm --filter happy exec vitest run --project unit src/daemon/controlServer.test.ts src/persistence.test.ts src/modules/common/pathSecurity.test.ts src/claude/utils/proxyBypass.test.ts && pnpm --filter happy-server-self-host exec vitest run sources/app/api/authNonce.test.ts sources/app/api/routes/authRoutes.test.ts sources/app/api/routes/attachmentRoutes.spec.ts
